overall.description: A slow cinematic pan across a grand gothic hall in a dark fantasy video game, featuring ornate stone architecture, a central spiral staircase, and robed characters moving through the space. The scene combines warm torchlight with cool natural light filtering through a large archway.

lit torch mounted on the stone wall providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the left side of a grand gothic hall, dominated by heavy velvet curtains and warm torchlight. A spiral staircase is visible in the distance, and a robed NPC walks toward it across the polished stone floor.

events.description: natural light from the large archway becomes more prominent as the camera pans right, mixing with the torchlight

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, revealing the full height of the staircase and upper balcony levels

notable_agents.action: robed figure ascending the spiral staircase steps

entered.detail: tall gothic archway with bright light filtering through from outside
ornate carved stone railing along the upper level of the staircase

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans toward the center, the spiral staircase dominates the view with its ornate stone railing. Natural light begins to stream in from a large archway on the right, and NPCs are seen ascending the stairs.

events.description: focus shifts to the brightly lit archway revealing a large white-robed figure standing near the entrance

agents.ego_description: panning to focus on the right side of the hall near the illuminated archway and the prominent statue

notable_agents.action: large white-robed figure standing stationary near the archway entrance

entered.detail: tall statue or character draped in white robes standing near the archway
strong natural light streaming through the archway illuminating the scene

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the right side of the hall where a large archway admits bright natural light. A prominent white-robed figure stands near the entrance, and the spiral staircase recedes to the left background as the pan completes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous pan across a grand gothic hall that shifts from the warm, shadowed intimacy of torchlit drapery to the bright, open expanse of a sunlit archway. It begins on the left side of the chamber, where heavy velvet curtains frame a polished stone floor and a robed figure walks toward a distant spiral staircase. As the camera glides toward the center, the ornate stone railing of the staircase becomes the focal point while cool natural light begins to bleed into the frame from the right. The scene then expands toward the right side of the hall, where the staircase recedes into the background to reveal a large archway flooding the space with brightness. Finally, the movement settles on a prominent white-robed figure standing near the entrance, completing the transition from golden interior warmth to brilliant daylight.
